daily.today_energy: Your emotional intuition is absolutely dialed in right now. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your spiritual GPS. Channel that sensitivity into something creative or meaningful today.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Real talk over coffee hits different. Single? Someone's noticing your authentic energy from across the room. Keep being yourself.
daily.career: Your ideas have momentum behind them, even if they feel half-baked. Share that project draft or pitch anyway—collaboration will shape it into something solid. Your instincts are directionally correct.
daily.health: Your nervous system could use some grounding. Touch grass literally, or try something tactile that calms you down. Your body's asking for presence, not optimization. Listen to what feels nourishing.
